title: crotalaria chamaepeuce
intro: Crotalaria chamaepeuce is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the leaves and stems being used to make teas or applied topically as a poultice.
